definition: perturbations with a usable genome-scale effect vector in the processed release
rows whose perturbation_id is an ENSG gene id (a gene knockdown)
distinct HGNC gene symbols perturbed (no duplicates)
NTC / safe-harbor / non-targeting rows among the scored perturbations (controls are the baseline effects are measured against, not scored rows)
RICTOR, PAK2, RIPK1 (carried into candidate-specific deep validation)
